action.content: Write a funny poem for kids about a product that you would like to sell. The poem should have exactly 6 stanzas. Separated the stanzas using 3 asterisk markers: ***
action.label: context

action.content:
I have a hat that talks to you,
With silly voices, loud and new!
It says "Good morning" when you wake,
And tells a joke before you take
A bite of toast or sip of tea,
The funniest hat you've ever seen!

***

It sings a song when you are sad,
About a dancing, happy tad.
It hums a tune when you are tired,
And makes your sleepy eyes get wider.
It whispers secrets in your ear,
About a dragon in your chair!

***

The hat can change its color too,
From bright blue sky to sunny view.
It turns to green if you are scared,
Or pink and fluffy, everywhere!
It flashes red when you are fast,
And makes the whole room look like cast.

***

You can ask it riddles, yes, you can,
It answers with a funny plan.
"Where is my sock?" you might ask,
"It's hiding in your left-hand mask!"
It knows where toys have gone to play,
And helps you find them every day.

***

No other hat can do this thing,
To make your boring day go spring.
It tells you stories of the moon,
And how the stars are having a tune.
It's perfect for a birthday treat,
Or just to make your day complete.

***

So buy my hat and wear it high,
Under the vast and open sky!
It's the best gift you could ever get,
To make your laughter never wet.
Just say "Hello" to start the show,
And watch the magic start to grow!
action.label: response
